items.name: renewlet
items.description: Renewlet 是一个自托管的订阅管理工具。它把 SaaS、AI 工具、云服务和开发工具的价格、续费日、预算和提醒放到一起，适合个人、独立团队和家庭实验室使用。

items.name: turbohaul-manager
items.description: Ollama-shape inference manager using Tom's TurboQuant llama.cpp. FIFO queue + grace + IDLE_HOT hot-hold + model swap on Blackwell.

items.name: wArrden
items.description: [Mirror] wArrden makes it easy to maintain your Radarr and Sonarr libraries by finding missing or upgradeable content, as well as detecting and clearing stuck imports from the queue.

items.name: mellifluous
items.description: Markdown-to-speech for macOS Apple Silicon. Parses structure, normalizes inline content, speaks with pauses that feel like real reading. TTS runs locally on MLX with voice cloning.

items.name: mei
items.description: Mirror do MEI - A stateless C99 orchestrator that coordinates autonomous AI agents using Fossil SCM as its single source of truth and Tmux for process isolation.

items.name: survival-alpha
items.description: Open-source CLI for TradingView backtest hygiene, honest metrics, hygiene checks, and Pine→Python translation.

items.name: lean-qwen
items.description: AI Task Delegation, subsidize your cloud costs.

items.name: ohos-scrcpy-app
items.description: 鸿镜是一个类似安卓Scrcpy，面向 OpenHarmony 设备的投屏开发调试工具。客户端基于Flutter 跨平台，通过 hdc fport 端口转发与设备上常驻的系统服务通信，实时镜像屏幕并提供触控注入、应用管理、终端模拟等控制功能。

items.name: TTAI-Image-Recognizer
items.description: A Qt desktop app for ONNX-powered image recognition with EfficientNet-B0.

items.name: video-reels-agent
items.description: Workspace tự động tạo short-form video bằng AI: ElevenLabs TTS + HyperFrames (HTML→MP4)

items.name: ai-gateway-utools
items.description: 一个utools插件，作为本地的AI网关层

items.name: agorafx
items.description: African FX prediction markets powered by an autonomous AI agent on @arc

items.name: GitMid
items.description: Toolkit de IA avanzado para Desarrolladores. Genera commits inteligentes, redacta changelogs impecables y entiende cualquier código al instante desde tu terminal.

items.name: LeafNEL
items.description: LeafNEL

items.name: neowind
items.description: buscador/reproductor de anime para la terminal, totalmente compatible con Linux y Windows mediante automatización nativa de Python.

items.name: transformerlens_skill
items.description: Reusable TransformerLens modules for mechanistic interpretability workflows: model loading, activation caching, causal intervention, activation patching, attribution patching, causal tracing, logit-lens, activation steering, and probing utilities for transformer internals.

items.name: cit411-finance-tracker
items.description: A Python command-line finance tracker that records income and expenses, validates user input, calculates a running balance, and prints a formatted ledger.

items.name: riderjets-web-app
items.description: Ryderjets web app on AWS to track the vehicles.

items.name: pianolog
items.description: Passively records piano MIDI events to track practice habits

items.name: ai-lead-generation-florida
items.description: AI lead generation systems for local businesses in Florida | civados.com
